_help._note: This section contains documentation for all parameters. Scripts ignore this section.

yolo.model: YOLO model filename (e.g., yolov8x-pose.pt for extra-large, yolov8m-pose.pt for medium)
yolo.model_dir: Directory where YOLO models are stored
yolo.confidence_threshold: Minimum confidence score (0-1) for detections. Higher = fewer but more confident detections
yolo.iou_threshold: IoU threshold (0-1) for NMS. Higher = fewer duplicate boxes, more lenient overlap
yolo.brightness_boost: Multiplier for image brightness. 1.0 = no change, >1.0 = brighter
yolo.use_half_precision: Use FP16 for faster inference on GPU. Requires CUDA-capable GPU
yolo.imgsz: Input image size for YOLO. Larger = more accurate but slower (640, 1280, etc.)

video.input_path: Default video file path for processing
video.output_path: Default output path for results (parquet file)
video.default_input_dir: Default directory to look for videos
video.max_resolution: Maximum resolution for video processing (width x height)
video.auto_repair: Automatically repair corrupted videos using ffmpeg before processing

encoding.h264_preset: H264 encoding preset (ultrafast, fast, medium, slow, veryslow). Slower = better quality
encoding.h264_crf: Constant Rate Factor (0-51). Lower = better quality, 18 is visually lossless
encoding.resize_preset: Resize algorithm speed (fast, medium, slow). Fast uses bilinear, slow uses lanczos

device.use_cuda: Enable GPU acceleration. Requires CUDA-capable NVIDIA GPU

tracking.tracker: Tracker config file for Ultralytics (auto-generated from botsort section)
tracking.persist: Keep track IDs across video. Essential for consistent tracking
tracking.verbose: Print detailed tracking information during processing
tracking.enable_fallback: Enable fallback tracking when primary tracker fails
tracking.fallback_max_distance: Maximum pixel distance for fallback track matching

scripts.inspect_parquet: Script for inspecting parquet output files

boxmot._description: Configuration for BoxMOT BotSort tracker (used by 1_pose_anesthesiologist_boxmot.py)
boxmot.reid_model: ReID model filename (e.g., osnet_ain_x1_0_msmt17.pt for OSNet)
boxmot.reid_model_dir: Directory containing ReID model (. = current directory)
boxmot.track_high_thresh: High confidence threshold for track confirmation. Higher = stricter
boxmot.track_low_thresh: Low confidence threshold for track detection. Lower = more permissive
boxmot.new_track_thresh: Threshold for creating new tracks. Higher = fewer new tracks
boxmot.track_buffer: Number of frames to keep lost tracks alive before deletion
boxmot.match_thresh: Matching threshold for associating detections to tracks. Higher = stricter
boxmot.proximity_thresh: IoU threshold for spatial proximity matching. Higher = closer proximity required
boxmot.appearance_thresh: Cosine distance threshold for appearance matching. Lower = stricter appearance similarity
boxmot.cmc_method: Camera Motion Compensation method (sof, orb, ecc, sift). sof = Sparse Optical Flow

strongsort._description: Configuration for BoxMOT StrongSort tracker (used by 1_pose_anesthesiologist_boxmot_v2.py)
strongsort.min_conf: Minimum detection confidence to start a track. Lower = more tracks
strongsort.max_cos_dist: Maximum cosine distance for appearance matching. Lower = stricter
strongsort.max_iou_dist: Maximum IoU distance for motion matching. Higher = more lenient
strongsort.max_age: Maximum frames to keep lost tracks alive (similar to track_buffer)
strongsort.n_init: Number of consecutive detections needed to confirm a track
strongsort.nn_budget: Nearest neighbor budget for ReID feature matching
strongsort.mc_lambda: Motion compensation lambda for EMA. Higher = more weight on history
strongsort.ema_alpha: Exponential moving average alpha for smoothing. Higher = more smoothing

botsort._description: Configuration for Ultralytics BoT-SORT tracker (used by 1_pose_anesthesiologist.py)
botsort.tracker_type: Type of tracker (botsort). Auto-generated into YAML file
botsort.track_high_thresh: High confidence threshold for track confirmation
botsort.track_low_thresh: Low confidence threshold for track detection
botsort.track_buffer: Number of frames to keep lost tracks alive
botsort.fuse_score: Fuse detection score with IoU for matching. Improves accuracy
botsort.gmc_method: Global Motion Compensation method (sparseOptFlow, orb, etc.)
botsort.proximity_thresh: IoU threshold for spatial proximity matching
botsort.appearance_thresh: Threshold for appearance-based matching using ReID
botsort.with_reid: Enable ReID feature extraction for appearance matching
botsort.model: YOLO model path for ReID feature extraction (auto mode uses native features)

YOLO_Models.yolov8n-pose.pt: Nano model - Fastest, least accurate (~8 MB)
YOLO_Models.yolov8s-pose.pt: Small model - Fast, good accuracy (~23 MB)
YOLO_Models.yolov8l-pose.pt: Large model - Slower, better accuracy (~87 MB)
YOLO_Models.yolov8x-pose.pt: Extra-large model - Slowest, best accuracy (~131 MB)

Tracking_Algorithms.BotSort_Ultralytics: Native Ultralytics implementation. Fast, integrated with YOLO. Uses YOLO features for ReID.
Tracking_Algorithms.BotSort_BoxMOT: BoxMOT implementation with external ReID (OSNet). Better re-identification after occlusions.
Tracking_Algorithms.StrongSort_BoxMOT: More robust long-term tracking. Better for crowded scenes and long occlusions.

ReID_Models.osnet_ain_x1_0_msmt17.pt: OSNet model trained on MSMT17 dataset. Best for person re-identification across cameras/occlusions.

Tuning_Tips.For_fewer_ID_switches: Increase track_buffer, decrease new_track_thresh, increase appearance_thresh weight
Tuning_Tips.For_crowded_scenes: Use StrongSort, increase appearance_thresh weight, decrease proximity_thresh
Tuning_Tips.For_simple_scenes: Use Ultralytics BotSort (fastest), can use lower track_buffer
Tuning_Tips.GPU_acceleration: Set use_half_precision=true and use_cuda=true for 2-3x speedup on NVIDIA GPUs

Common_Issues.Too_many_unique_IDs: Track buffer too low, new_track_thresh too low, or poor ReID. Increase track_buffer and new_track_thresh.
Common_Issues.Missing_detections: Confidence_threshold too high or wrong model size. Lower threshold or use larger model.
Common_Issues.Slow_processing: Image size too large or model too big. Reduce imgsz or use smaller model (yolov8m instead of yolov8x).
Common_Issues.Poor_tracking: Wrong tracker for scene type. Use StrongSort for crowded scenes, BotSort for simple tracking.
